Lighting Product Property Ontology (LPPO): Overview back to ToC

This ontology has the following classes and properties.

Classes

  • Electrical Properties
  • Emergency Lighting Properties
  • Marketing Properties
  • Mechanical Properties
  • Mounting Accessory Properties
  • Operations Maintenance Properties
  • Photometric Properties
  • Sensing Device Properties

Object Properties

  • has Electrical Properties
  • has Emergency Lighting Properties
  • has Marketing Properties
  • has Mechanical Properties
  • has Mounting Accessory Properties
  • has Operations Maintenance Properties
  • has Photometric Properties
  • has Sensing Device Properties

Lighting Product Property Ontology (LPPO): Description back to ToC

The Lighting Product Property Ontology (LPPO) v2.0 provides a data dictionary for the properties describing electric lighting products, luminaires and sensing devices used in the construction industry. Developed in accordance with SIS-CEN/TS 17623:2021.

Cross-reference for Lighting Product Property Ontology (LPPO) classes, object properties and data properties back to ToC

This section provides details for each class and property defined by Lighting Product Property Ontology (LPPO).

Classes

  • Electrical Properties
  • Emergency Lighting Properties
  • Marketing Properties
  • Mechanical Properties
  • Mounting Accessory Properties
  • Operations Maintenance Properties
  • Photometric Properties
  • Sensing Device Properties

Electrical Propertiesc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#ElectricalProperties

has super-classes
Property Group c
is in domain of
2nd Rated Voltage dp, active Power dp, apparent Load dp, cable Cross Section dp, clamping Range dp, colour Controllable dp, colour Temperature Controllable dp, compensation Type dp, constant Light Output dp, constant Light Output Average Power dp, constant Light Output End Power dp, constant Light Output Start Power dp, control Features dp, control Gear dp, control Gear Included dp, control Gear Location dp, control Gear Quantity dp, control Gear Replaceable dp, control Gear Required dp, dali Dt8 dp, default Light Source Power dp, dimmable dp, dimming Control Method dp, dimming Method dp, dimming Range dp, electrical Safety Class dp, energy Efficiency Of Ballast dp, ilcos Light Source Type dp, impulse Withstand Voltage dp, ingress Protection Ip Code dp, inrush Current dp, inrush Current Time dp, integral Circuit Protection dp, interface dp, led Module Replaceable dp, light Source Count dp, light Source Included dp, light Source Position Of Usage dp, maximum Nominal Output Power Of Light Source dp, multilamp Light Source Wattage dp, nominal Current dp, nominal Frequency dp, nominal Light Source Output Power dp, nominal Mains Voltage dp, number Of Phases dp, power Consumption Of The Controls dp, power Factor dp, quantity Of Addresses dp, radiation Pattern File dp, radiation Transmitting Frequency dp, radiation Transmitting Standard dp, radio Transmitting Power dp, rated Input Power dp, rated Voltage dp, socket dp, standby Power dp, supply Circuit Conductor dp, supply Phase dp, surge Protection dp, through Wiring dp, total Harmonic Distortion Thd dp, voltage Type dp, with Connecting Cable dp, with Dimmer dp, with Power Plug dp, with Sensing Device dp, with Switch dp, zhaga Standard dp
is in range of
has Electrical Properties op

Emergency Lighting Propertiesc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#EmergencyLightingProperties

has super-classes
Property Group c
is in domain of
addressability dp, backup Supply System dp, battery Capacity dp, battery Form Factor dp, battery Type dp, battery Voltage dp, current Dc Operation dp, dedicated Emergency Lighting Type dp, duration Time And Luminous Flux Of Emergency Lighting dp, emergency Facilities dp, emergency Ldc dp, emergency Lighting Charging Power dp, emergency Lighting Initial Charge Time dp, emergency Lighting Inrush Current dp, emergency Lighting Inrush Current Time dp, emergency Lighting Light Source Type dp, emergency Lighting Rated Input Power dp, emergency Lighting Recharge Time dp, emergency Nominal Voltage dp, emergency Operation Type dp, emergency Unit Integrated dp, maximum Luminous Flux Of Emergency Lighting dp, pictogram Escape Direction dp, suitable For Emergency Lighting dp, testing Method dp, viewing Distance dp
is in range of
has Emergency Lighting Properties op

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#MarketingProperties

has super-classes
Property Group c
is in domain of
2d Symbol dp, application dp, approval Mark dp, assembly Code dp, assembly Description dp, assembly Place dp, basic Unit dp, bip Code dp, chemical Resistance dp, co2 Footprint dp, conformity Mark dp, construction Design Management dp, cost Of Installation dp, cuneco Cassification System Ccs Code dp, delivery dp, description dp, ebkp Number dp, efo Class Number dp, el Number dp, energy Efficiency Class dp, environmental Assessment Rating dp, execution dp, features dp, fire Protection dp, fire Protection Labelling dp, gtin Number dp, housing Colour dp, housing Material dp, housing Surface dp, item Number dp, lead Time dp, light Transmitting Surface Material dp, logistics dp, luminaire Type Cie97 dp, manufacturer dp, nbs Code dp, omniclass Number dp, omniclass Title dp, optical System dp, price dp, product Data Sheet dp, product Family dp, product Group dp, product Name dp, product Picture dp, production Year dp, radio Interference Suppression dp, risk Management dp, rohs Directive dp, special Function dp, standards dp, tender Text dp, timecode Of Manufacture Data Creation dp, uniclass Code dp, update Cycle Of Manufacture Data Creation dp, url Manufacturer dp, url Product Website dp

has Marketing Properties op

has super-classes
Property Group c
is in domain of

has Mechanical Properties op

has super-classes
Property Group c
is in domain of
applied Accessory dp, applied Mounting Height dp, applied Pendant Length dp, ball Impact Resistant dp, bracket dp, bracket Length dp, conductor Rail Type dp, covering Of Insulation Not Allowed dp, default Mounting Distance dp, default Mounting Height dp, ex Classification Properties dp, foldable dp, installation Specification dp, max Ambient Temperature dp, maximum Mounting Height dp, maximum Pendant Length dp, min Ambient Temperature dp, minimum Mounting Height dp, mounting Outside The Arms Reach dp, mounting Place dp, mounting Point Offset Position X Direction dp, mounting Point Offset Position Y Direction dp, mounting Point Offset Position Z Direction dp, mounting Type dp, pole dp, pole Accessory dp, pole Height dp, pole Material dp, relative Humidity Range dp, required Space In Ceiling dp, spacing Between Fixing Points dp, spigot Diameter dp, thickness Of Ceiling Maximum dp, thickness Of Ceiling Minimum dp, type And Function Of Mandatory Accessory dp, type And Function Of Optional Accessory dp, typical Assembly Site dp, wall Thickness dp, windage dp, with Ascending Aid dp, with Base Plate dp, with Starter dp
is in range of
has Mounting Accessory Properties op

has super-classes
Property Group c
is in domain of
abrupt Failure Value dp, access Clearance Bottom dp, access Clearance Front dp, access Clearance Left dp, access Clearance Rear dp, access Clearance Right dp, access Clearance Top dp, acoustic Absorption Average dp, acoustic Absorption Table dp, amount Of Switching Cycles dp, assembly Place 1 dp, average Rated Life Of Light Source dp, battery Exchange After X Years dp, battery Exchange Possible dp, burn In Time dp, circuit Number dp, circuit Number And dp, control Gear Lifetime dp, disposal Symbol dp, health And Safety Information dp, lamp Lumen Maintenance Factor dp, lamp Survival Factor dp, luminaire Maintenance Factor dp, maintenance And Cleaning dp, maintenance Required According An Operation Time dp, maintenance Tasks According Sfg20 dp, median Useful Life dp, name Of Switch dp, noise Level dp, operation And Maintenance Manual dp, overall Mf dp, pnl Number dp, rated Ambient Temperature dp, replace Cover Glass dp, useful Life dp, warranty Id dp

Property Group c
is in domain of

Property Group c

channel N dp, delay Time dp, delay Time 1 dp, delay Time Orientation Light dp, detection Area dp, detection Area Adjustable dp, detection Method dp, detection Range Adjustable dp, detector Characteristics dp, hf Frequency dp, illuminance Range dp, interconnection Mode dp, measurement Method dp, movement Detection Area dp, number Of Detection Areas dp, number Of Pir Switching Zones dp, operation Mode dp, orientation Light dp, other Sensing Devices dp, output Channel N dp, presence Detection Area dp, radiation Power dp, remote Control dp, remote Control Deactivateable dp, sensing Device Position dp, separate Light Measurement N dp, switch Input Channel N dp, switching Capacity Of Sensing Device dp, type Of Detector dp

has Sensing Device Properties op

2d Symbolni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#2dSymbol

has facts
description dp "Symbol in floor plan."@en
has G U I D dp "020_6qAJj7fO641UbZtyld"
has Name dp "2D symbol"@en
has I D dp "07-0006"
is also defined as
data property

2nd Rated Voltageni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#2ndRatedVoltage

has facts
description dp "Rated voltage on the secondary side (in the case of lighting using a voltage converter). Reference – Check with IEC/TC34"@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, V)"
has G U I D dp "3bHsk$G7n05BgiaYUYUg6s"
has Name dp "2nd rated voltage"@en
has I D dp "02-0067"
is also defined as
data property

has facts
description dp "The description of a location of the 3D model file."@en

has Name dp "3D model file"@en
has I D dp "01-0050"
is also defined as
data property

abrupt Failure Valueni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#abruptFailureValue

has facts
description dp "Abrupt failure value AFV percentile of LED modules failing to operate at median useful life, Lx. AFV depended significantly on the control gear failure."@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, %)"
has G U I D dp "19BQiuhJj8qgDgvk6nbxxB"
has Name dp "abrupt failure value"@en
has I D dp "08-0015"
symbol dp "AFV"
is also defined as
data property

acoustic Absorption Tableni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#acousticAbsorptionTable

has facts
description dp "The sound absorption coefficient (ISO 354:2003) presented in table depending on frequencies in the human hearable range."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-2, n.a. 1E0, Hz)"
has G U I D dp "03XhO08LHDWvZXteTHjOi9"
has Name dp "acoustic absorption table"@en
has I D dp "08-0030"
is also defined as
data property

active Powerni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#activePower

has facts
description dp "Consumption of the power corresponding to the dim level of the luminaire. It is presented as a table of power (W) related to the luminous flux emitted (lm) or the percentage of dimming (%)."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-2, W 1E0, lm OR 1E0, %)"
has G U I D dp "0zjByQSTX24wsxTI25Lzj$"
has Name dp "active power"@en
has I D dp "02-0004"
is also defined as
data property

lamp Lumen Maintenance Factorni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#lampLumenMaintenanceFactor

has facts
description dp "The lamp lumen maintenance factor is the ratio of luminous flux at a specific time compared to a new light source. It is describing the aging of the light source or the reduction of light intensity over time. The time for the LLMF is related to the median useful life."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-2, n.a.)"
has G U I D dp "2Ys5wBTunE_AZBAQnsTadY"
has Name dp "lamp lumen maintenance factor"@en
has I D dp "08-0016"
symbol dp "LLMF"
is also defined as
data property

lamp Survival Factorni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#lampSurvivalFactor

has facts
description dp "The lamp survival factor depends on the service lifetime of a light source. LSF=1 is saying that there will be no loss of light because of light source failure."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-2, n.a.)"
has G U I D dp "3i22ssv3nDYAGDmO9prt0t"
has Name dp "lamp survival factor"@en
has I D dp "08-0017"
symbol dp "LSF"
is also defined as
data property

luminaire Maintenance Factorni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#luminaireMaintenanceFactor

has facts
description dp "The luminaire maintenance factor is the ratio of the luminaires luminous flux before and after cleaning. It is presented as a table of environmental conditions depending on the cleaning period of the luminaire in years. Classification of the environmental conditions based on CIE 97:2005: VC Very clean, C Clean, N Normal, D Dirty."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-1, years n.a.)"
has G U I D dp "3zQynANFH5AxO46k9nGJV_"
has Name dp "luminaire maintenance factor"@en
has I D dp "08-0018"
symbol dp "LMF"
is also defined as
data property

median Useful Lifeni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#medianUsefulLife

has facts
description dp "Median useful life (of LED modules). Length of time during which 50 % (B50) of a population of operating LED modules of the same type have parametrically failed to provide at least percentage Lx of the initial luminous flux. Recommend in fixed time value for Median Useful Life 35k, 50k, 75k, and/or 100k hours according application."@en
has G U I D dp "0NMpOQzNH679doR_IuOYUl"
has Name dp "median useful life"@en
has I D dp "08-0013"
symbol dp "Lx"

data property

mounting Point Offset Position Z Directionni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#mountingPointOffsetPositionZDirection

has facts
description dp "Z position of the point used as origin for the mounting in relation to the middle of the bounding box. Positive values are aligned with the gamma angle 180° (up). digital Format dp "(1E0, mm)"
has G U I D dp "34itbruFnDWgvJgUmwG$rq"
has Name dp "mounting point offset position z direction"@en
has I D dp "06-0006"

overall Mfni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#overallMf

has facts
description dp "Overall MF required to adapt the variations of MF standards. E.g., Japanese Maintenance Factor standard JIEG-001(2013) defines and uses “Ml”, “Md” instead of “LLMF”, “LSF”, “LMF”, “RSMF”. The Japanese MF Procedure is different from CIE 97:2005. Overall MF covers the difference."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-2)"
has G U I D dp "0$H_zVMtjA3vm1ce$LVc1D"
has Name dp "overall MF"@en
has I D dp "08-0036"

has Name dp "overall radius"@en

photobiology Classni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#photobiologyClass

has facts
description dp "The required measurement methods and the calculation methodology are set in the harmonized standard IEC 62471:2009 / CIE S009:2006 „Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems“. The standard divides the sources of incoherent optical radiation into four groups: in the Exempt Group (no photobiological risk) and the Risk Groups 1 to 3 with increasing hazard potential."@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, n.a.)"
has G U I D dp "1PL17P9t53oexZksoRkx7Y"
has Name dp "photobiology class"@en
has I D dp "04-0037"
is also defined as
data property

has facts

photometric Centre Position Z Directionni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#photometricCentrePositionZDirection

has facts
description dp "Z position of the point used as origin for photometric measurements and calculations in relation to the middle of the bounding box. Positive values are aligned with the gamma angle 180° (up). Negative values are aligned with the gamma angle 0° (down). If the light centre point is at the bottom side, then this value is the negative half of the height. See also EN 13032-4:2015."@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, mm)"
has G U I D dp "2MDJxTVzv57ALNnXX1bC1W"
has Name dp "photometric centre position z direction"@en
has I D dp "04-0004"
is also defined as
data property

rated Ambient Temperatureni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

has facts

has G U I D dp "0bitv3Ynz53umOYqdoyGy7"

data property

rated Chromaticity Coordinate Valuesni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#ratedChromaticityCoordinateValues

has facts
description dp "Chromaticity coordinates ratio of each of a set of 3 tristimulus values to their sum according ISO 11664-1:2007. As the sum of the 3 chromaticity coordinates is equal to 1, two of them are sufficient to define a chromaticity. In the CIE standard colorimetric systems, the chromaticity coordinates are represented by the symbols x, y, z and x10, y10, z10."@en
digital Format dp "(1E-2, n.a.)"
has G U I D dp "2VsGUEC0v62AXkp0i8pFrI"
has Name dp "rated chromaticity coordinate values"@en
has I D dp "04-0032"
is also defined as
data property

tlcini back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#tlci

has facts
description dp "Television Lighting Consistency Index (TLCI) evaluate the spectral power distribution of luminaires for television purposes. The higher result the better colour rendering quality from range 0 to 100. See also EN 12193:2018. Maybe CIE."@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, n.a.)"
has G U I D dp "1dN7YuSk56zRdAl0GO075q"
has Name dp "TLCI"@en
has I D dp "04-0027"
is also defined as
data property

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#totalHarmonicDistortionThd

upward Light Output Ratio Ulorni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#upwardLightOutputRatioUlor

has facts
description dp "Ratio of the upward luminous flux of the luminaire, measured under specified practical conditions with its own light source(s) and equipment, to the sum of the individual luminous fluxes of the same light source(s) when operated outside the luminaire with the same equipment, under specified conditions. Not valid for absolute photometry."@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, %)"
has G U I D dp "00NGdZChz3LACcedAVtNNR"
has Name dp "upward light output ratio ULOR"@en
has I D dp "04-0013"
is also defined as
data property

upward Light Ratio Ulrni back to ToC or Named Individual ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/ppon/lppo#upwardLightRatioUlr

has facts
description dp "Ratio of the total luminaire flux that is emitted above the horizontal by all luminaires to the total luminaire flux from all luminaires in an installation, when the luminaires are mounted in their mounting position."@en
digital Format dp "(1E0, %)"
has G U I D dp "1sYsm6e7H82AbC_0tk06XB"
has Name dp "upward light ratio ULR"@en
has I D dp "04-0012"
is also defined as
data property
